---
title: "Personal"
---

 
I'm originally from Nara, Japan. 
I'm enthusiastic about watching sports, especially baseball and basketball. 

::: {.column-page}
::: {layout-ncol=3}
![Kyocera Dome Osaka: Orix Buffaloes](pictures/hobby.jpeg){width="100%" .gallery-img}
![My Home Town](pictures/hometown.jpeg){width="100%" .gallery-img}
![Detroit Pistons](pictures/pistons.jpeg){width="100%" .gallery-img}
:::
:::
